name: Improper Handling of Insufficient Entropy in TRNG
description: True random number generators (TRNG) generally have a limited source of entropy and can fail or block. When the product does not properly handle TRNG exhaustion or failure, it may fall back to predictable values or cause a denial-of-service condition.
detection_pattern: EXTERNAL(trng_source) feeds into TRANSFORM node for random number generation, and CONTROL node does not handle the case where the TRNG blocks or fails, potentially causing EGRESS or AUTH nodes to receive predictable fallback values or triggering availability issues
